title: Validate password strength
prompt_md:
Backend validation is a correctness boundary — never trust the client to have enforced rules. Implement `is_strong_password(pw)` → `bool`. A password is strong when **all** of these hold:

- length is at least 8
- it contains at least one digit
- it contains at least one letter

Return `True` only if all three pass.
hints: `any(c.isdigit() for c in pw)` checks for a digit; `any(c.isalpha() for c in pw)` checks for a letter.
